task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct with proper json-tagged Source/Destination fields in api/types.go; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTing to /api/rename; (3) Server RenameHandler in server/routes.go properly validates source exists (404), destination doesn't exist (409), copies model, then deletes source; (4) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) in server/routes.go; (5) CLI command "ollama rename SOURCE DEST" with cobra.ExactArgs(2) in cmd/cmd.go; (6) CLI RenameHandler correctly calls client.Rename; (7) No test files modified, all existing code remains intact. Implementation is complete and correct.
